description: DevOps worker agent: CI/CD pipeline design, Dockerfile and compose authoring, Kubernetes manifests, deploy strategies (blue-green, canary, rolling), observability wiring, secrets handling — implements pipeline and infra config end to end. Owns CI/CD and production infrastructure; defers generating local docker-compose dev environments to the dev-env plugin.

reasons: out-of-band: install via install-agents.sh (Codex plugins cannot bundle subagents); model omitted (inherits session model)

interface.longDescription:
DevOps worker agent: CI/CD pipeline design, Dockerfile and compose authoring, Kubernetes manifests, deploy strategies (blue-green, canary, rolling), observability wiring, secrets handling — implements pipeline and infra config end to end. Includes a devops-engineer agent. Owns CI/CD and production infrastructure; defers generating local docker-compose dev environments to the dev-env plugin.

Codex fidelity: 0 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s); requires co-install of: docker-best-practices.
interface.shortDescription: DevOps worker agent: CI/CD pipeline design, Dockerfile and compose authoring, Kubernetes manifests, deploy strategies (blue-green, canary, rolling), observability wiring, secrets handling — implements pipeline and infra config end to end. Owns CI/CD and production infrastructure; defers generating local docker-compose dev environments to the dev-env plugin.

name: devops
